title: Mildly Sweet Thai Curry with Crispy Lardons
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Thai curry with the added crunch of crispy lardons. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the lardons and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove the lardons from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the curry paste to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
5. Add the fish sauce and cook for 1 minute.
6. Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
7. Add the cooked lardons back into the skillet and stir to combine.
8. Season with salt and sugar to taste.
9. Garnish with chopped thai basil and serve over rice or noodles.
